# discord_auto_moderation_rule (Resource)

Manages an auto-moderation rule in a Discord guild. The `trigger_metadata` fields (`keyword_filter`, `regex_patterns`, `presets`, `allow_list`, `mention_total_limit`) apply only to the relevant `trigger_type`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Keyword filter rule (trigger_type 1) that blocks matching messages.
resource "discord_auto_moderation_rule" "no_spam" {
  server_id      = "123456789012345678"
  name           = "Block banned words"
  event_type     = 1 # message send
  trigger_type   = 1 # keyword
  enabled        = true
  keyword_filter = ["badword", "anotherword"]

  actions = [
    {
      type = 1 # block message
    },
    {
      type       = 2 # send alert
      channel_id = "456789012345678901"
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Attributes List) Actions taken when the rule triggers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--actions))
- `event_type` (Number) Event that triggers the rule (`1` message send, `2` member update).
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.
- `trigger_type` (Number) Trigger type (`1` keyword, `3` spam, `4` keyword preset, `5` mention spam). Changing it replaces the rule.

### Optional

- `allow_list` (Set of String) Substrings exempt from the trigger.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `exempt_channels` (Set of String) Channel ids exempt from the rule.
- `exempt_roles` (Set of String) Role ids exempt from the rule.
- `keyword_filter` (Set of String) Substrings to match (trigger type keyword).
- `mention_total_limit` (Number) Max unique mentions per message (trigger type mention spam).
- `presets` (Set of Number) Keyword preset ids (`1` profanity, `2` sexual content, `3` slurs).
- `regex_patterns` (Set of String) Regular expressions to match (trigger type keyword).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the rule.

<a id="nestedatt--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Required:

- `type` (Number) Action type (`1` block message, `2` send alert, `3` timeout).

Optional:

- `channel_id` (String) Channel to log alerts to (action type send alert).
- `custom_message` (String) Custom message shown when a message is blocked.
- `duration_seconds` (Number) Timeout duration in seconds (action type timeout).
